plugins.name: zig-claude-kit
plugins.description: Corrective context for Zig 0.15.x that fixes Claude's outdated training data. Covers I/O (Writergate), build.zig, format strings, ArrayList, BoundedArray, and usingnamespace.

plugins.name: tiger-style
plugins.description: TigerBeetle's Tiger Style methodology for Zig: assertions (2+ per fn, paired positive/negative), bounded loops (no recursion), static memory after init, snake_case naming with unit suffixes, 70-line function limit, 100-column line limit, zig fmt. Auto-loads in Zig projects.

plugins.name: tdd-pipeline
plugins.description: Language-agnostic TDD pipeline with test-first agents, review loops, and verify gates. Agents inherit the session model, or pin one per run with --model.

plugins.name: cross-review
plugins.description: Multi-model code review with cross-validation. Orchestrates Claude and GPT-5.5 reviews, validates findings against each other, outputs merged fix list. Pass --model to set the Claude-side model.

plugins.name: knowledge-forge
plugins.description: Cross-session routing and capture for a three-layer personal knowledge base. Auto-discovered skill teaches index-first retrieval. /kb-capture files notes into the right wiki bucket. /kb-ingest downloads external doc packs from any session.

plugins.name: fleet-efficiency
plugins.description: Context-handoff, prompt-cache, and model-tier rules for fanning out many subagents. Auto-loads before large parallel agent dispatches, Workflow scripts, audits, and migrations.
